name: radio-group
title: Radio Group
description: Native radio inputs grouped under a fieldset radiogroup. The group shares one native name via context, each Radio's visible label is the 44px pointer target with start or center content alignment, and selection plus arrow-key navigation are the browser's own behavior.
useWhen: Choosing exactly one option from roughly 2-6 visible choices
All options should be visible at once so users can compare them
Each option needs supporting description text
avoidWhen: More than ~6 options or constrained space (use select)
A single yes/no choice (use one checkbox)

keyboard: Tab moves focus into the group (to the checked radio, or the first radio when none is checked); a second Tab leaves the group
Arrow Down / Arrow Right move focus and selection to the next radio, wrapping to the first
Arrow Up / Arrow Left move focus and selection to the previous radio, wrapping to the last
Space selects the focused radio when none is selected
Disabling the group (native fieldset disabled) removes every radio from the tab order
All behavior is the native radio inputs' own - nothing is re-implemented in script
accessibility.targetSize: 44px project default (each padded label row is the pointer target)
